candidate_summary: 12-band pentatonic-mode RoPE frequency allocation per attention head; 6-pair structure with K-share + V-octave/unison scaling; movable-bridge per-band learnable fine-tune offset δ_band; 2.5-octave bandwidth. Inspired by Korean gayageum.
content_words: 12-band pentatonic RoPE frequency allocation per head

results.title: Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026
results.rationale: Frequency-band emergence in RoPE directly overlaps 12-band allocation.

results.title: Q-ROAR Per-Band Scaling Quantized RoPE
results.rationale: Per-band K/Q scaling closely matches movable-bridge δ_band learnable per-band offset.

results.title: Mixed-Frequency RoPE EliteKV
results.rationale: Per-head band-specific frequency assignment overlaps 12-band per-head allocation.

results.title: Axial RoPE Banded Scaling Quantized
results.rationale: Log-spaced RoPE bands + per-band scaling directly matches pentatonic log-spaced + δ_band.

results.title: Q-ROAR OpenReview
results.rationale: Duplicate of Q-ROAR; per-band learnable scaling overlap.

results.title: Base Frequency RoPE Analytic
results.rationale: Weak overlap (only generic RoPE+frequency); hit via kw_count>=2 only.

results.title: Comparative RoPE Variants
results.rationale: Survey covering banded variants; weak generic overlap, hit via kw_count>=2.

results.title: RoPE Context Extension Per-Band Deep Dive
results.rationale: Per-band context-extension scaling directly overlaps movable-bridge per-band offsets.

decision_rationale: Candidate is fully covered by prior art: per-band RoPE frequency allocation (Frequency Bands RoPE, Mixed-Frequency RoPE), per-band learnable scaling matching movable-bridge δ_band (Q-ROAR, Axial RoPE Banded, per-band ctx-ext), and log-spaced banded structure (Axial RoPE). 12-band pentatonic + 6-pair K-share/V-octave + gayageum framing are stylistic re-skins; no core functional novelty. Verdict: FAIL.
